name: asdf-php
description: asdf/mise plugin for PHP via shivammathur/homebrew-php bottles

scripts.lint: npm run lint:shell && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:fmt
scripts.lint:shell: shellcheck -x -S warning bin/* lib/*.bash share/asdf-php-ext share/asdf-php-ini share/completions/asdf-php-ini.bash test/helpers.bash
